pre_game.message: Hey, I’m H. It’s a bit intense in here with the game looming, isn't it? What’s your name?
Nice to meet you, H. I'm D. It definitely is—everyone seems pretty focused on the prize. You ready for what's coming?
I’m trying to be. I’ve got a lot riding on this for my family, so I’m pretty determined. How about you? What’s your motivation for being here?
I’m in the same boat; I’m here to win for my family and the people I care about. This money would be a real game-changer for us.
It’s good to meet someone with their priorities straight; it definitely makes the pressure feel more worth it.
Definitely. It’s easier to push through the stress when you’re doing it for them. Have you heard anything about what we’re actually going to be doing yet?
Not a word yet, they’re keeping us in the dark. I’m just trying to stay ready for anything. How about you, heard any rumors?
Nothing at all. It feels like they're trying to psych us out by keeping us guessing.
Probably, but we can't let them get in our heads. Staying focused on why we're here is the only way to get through it.
You're right. Let's hope that focus pays off for both of us when things get started. Good luck, H.
Thanks, D. Good luck to you too. Let's do our best for our families. See you out there.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It was a pleasure playing with you!
It was a pleasure playing with you as well! I'm glad we both walked away with a fair share.
